prompt:
Issue Statement:
A society benefits most when its leaders are willing to revise long-standing policies in light of new evidence, even when those policies remain widely respected.
Task:
Write a response in which you discuss the extent to which you agree or disagree with the statement and explain your reasoning for the position you take. In developing and supporting your position, consider the ways in which the statement might or might not hold true and how these considerations shape your view.
